metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4528
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 5: L1CAM expression in PyNs is required not only for the formation but also for the maintenance of axo-axonal synapses as shown by the induction of L1CAM knockdown at postnatal day 28 and analysis at day P40 (panels L-O).
In addition, Fig. 6 shows that localization of L1CAM depends on the presence of Ankyrin G. (see also related annotation #4526 for synapse assembly)

26/02/2021 Dnyanada: The average number of gephyrin puncta per GFP puncta in the axon initial segment of the pyramidal neuron was decreased in L1CAM knockdown compared to control.. Experimental description: Temporal expression profile of endogenous L1CAM at the AIS of PyNs in LII of somatosensory cortex from CD1 mice (Legend to Fig. 5/p.366).

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
